commits.commitMessage: Fix + lint .ts extension in import specifiers
Clean exit if --fix fixes all issues (resolve #1577)
Fix tsconfig presets marked as unlisted in strict mode (resolve #1568)
Fix Astro sharpImageService() false positive for unused sharp (#1559)
Fix Bun plugin to handle directory arguments in `bun test`
Fix incorrect coverage provider being reported (#1552)
Fix require.context regex matching for path-aware patterns (#1547)
Fix false positives for arrow-wrapped dynamic imports assigned to variables (#1544)
Fix Yarn (Berry) plugins and binaries reported as unused (#1523)
Fix edge case for binaries in scripts
Fix up quoting for spaced args (resolve #1515)
Fix type in exported value case (resolve #1508)
Copy fix-fixtures to tmp dir
fix(prisma): Avoid crash if Prisma schema path is not specified (#1464)
Fix manual enabled compilers (#1457)
Improve react-router `appDir` + fix glob escaper
Fix up and reuse base graph objects in tests
Fix lint/format issues
Fix gitignore ancestor detection for git worktrees (#1424)
Fix Workspace Circular Symlink (#1319)
